title: The Cloud Ascent
lines: Your hands burn from the coarse hemp of the rope. You are deep within a swirling, Stygian mist that tastes of ozone and stagnant lightning.
Every muscle in your body screams as you haul yourself upward, dangling thousands of feet above a world that has likely forgotten your existence.

Suddenly, the mist breaks. Above you, the sky transitions into a deep, velvet violet. You see the massive, curved undersides of gargantuan, obsidian zeppelins, moored together with chains of cold iron.

options.desc: 1. Haul yourself onto the main zeppelin deck
2. Hang onto the rope and try to catch your breath
